mapper.select:
select de.id, de.user_id, de.debt_name, de.total_amount, de.remaining_amount, de.interest_rate, de.due_date, de.debt_type, de.created_at,
ui.name as userName, ui.images as userImages from debts de left join user_info ui on (ui.id = de.user_id) where 1 = 1
AND ui.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.userName},'%')
AND de.debt_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.debtName},'%')
order by de.id desc
